allow: Bash(node -e "const c=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(process.env.HOME+''/.openclaw/openclaw.json'',''utf8''\)\);const a=c.channels?.acp;const ids=a?.identities;const p=c.plugins?.entries?.acp;if\(a?.enabled&&ids&&Object.keys\(ids\).length>0&&p?.enabled\){const k=Object.keys\(ids\)[0];const e=ids[k];console.log\(''Config OK \(multi-identity mode\)''\);console.log\(''Identity:'',k\);console.log\(''AID:'',e.agentName+''.''+a.domain\)}else console.log\(''ERROR''\)")
Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/auliwenjiang/agentcp/contents/" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name'],x['type']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/auliwenjiang/agentcp/releases" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['tag_name'], r['name'], [a['name'] for a in r.get\('assets',[]\)]\) for r in data[:5]]" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://registry.npmjs.org/acp-ts" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('description:', d.get\('description'\)\); print\('latest:', d.get\('dist-tags',{}\).get\('latest'\)\); print\('keywords:', d.get\('keywords'\)\); readme=d.get\('readme',''\); print\(readme[:3000]\)" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/auliwenjiang/agentcp/contents/ap" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name'],x['type']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]" 2>/dev/null)
